calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carol Ryan for Petitioners/Trustees.

The Court stated that the issue was whether the Hillsborough property could go into the family trust. Ms. Ryan provided history of when the various trust had been established and presented oral argument to support her position. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
